svg.title: Vision architecture — full platform
svg.desc: Full vision architecture with Financial Resilience Engine, Mission Capacity Forecast, and Decision Intelligence Mart naming applied throughout

g.onclick: sendPrompt('IRS Form 990 via ProPublica API')
sendPrompt('Census ACS community demand data')
sendPrompt('BLS labor and wage data')
sendPrompt('USASpending federal grant data')
sendPrompt('SNAP enrollment leading indicators')
sendPrompt('Eviction Lab county-level data')
sendPrompt('USDA ERS food insecurity data')
sendPrompt('HUD CHAS housing burden data')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the Bronze landing layer?')
g.text: Append-only · unmodified · partitioned by source and year

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Financial feature engineering details')
sendPrompt('Capacity Gap Index feature engineering and hypothesis')
sendPrompt('Community demand and funder network features')
sendPrompt('Financial Resilience Engine using XGBoost and SHAP')
sendPrompt('Stress Signature Classification using DTW clustering')
sendPrompt('Mission Capacity Forecast using Prophet and NLP extraction')
sendPrompt('Community Risk Contagion Engine using NetworkX')
sendPrompt('How are composite scores assembled in the Decision Intelligence Mart?')
g.text: Resilience Score · Capacity Gap · Mission Capacity Forecast · Stress Signature · Network Vulnerability
Peer percentile · SHAP attribution · trajectory label · community impact projection

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Executive dashboard views in Power BI')
sendPrompt('Scenario simulator what-if analysis')
sendPrompt('Mission capacity view showing projected people served')
sendPrompt('Ecosystem risk map for funder contagion cascade')
sendPrompt('Trajectory signatures view showing stress patterns')
sendPrompt('How does the AI Executive Advisor generate grounded explanations?')
g.text: LLM grounded in SHAP values · peer benchmarks · trajectory signatures
Plain-language explanations · recommended actions · no hallucinated metrics

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the resilience report contain?')
sendPrompt('What do scenario outcome outputs look like?')
sendPrompt('What does the community impact projection show?')

svg.text: Platform: Microsoft Fabric · OneLake · Spark · MLflow · Power BI
ML: XGBoost · SHAP · Prophet · DTW clustering · NetworkX
P1 = Phase 1 MVP · P2 = Phase 2 · P3 = Phase 3 and beyond · Click any node to explore
